summary: Handheld on-scene footage of a large group of people walking along a road through a town, several carrying backpacks and holding umbrellas against the sun, with green hills behind. A watermark reads 'www.diariodelsur.com.mx.' The audio is Spanish-language narration. The tweet text describes a migrant caravan advancing through southern Mexico.

script.scene: Large group of people walking along a road through a town with backpacks and umbrellas, green hills behind; watermark 'www.diariodelsur.com.mx.'
